title: Yeah So, I Furnished It Up
description: A furniture mod designed to keep the texturing and modelling style of vanilla minecraft
body:
Yeah So, I Furnished It Up (YSIFIU for short) is the furniture entry into the Yeah So series, a series of mods aiming to expand the game whilst remaining modular enough to each be used on their own or all at once.

Currently, as of Version 0.1.0, the mod adds Counters, Drawers and 3 Variants of Cabinets for the wood types Oak, Spruce, Dark Oak, Birch, Acacia and Jungle (As seen in the first picture in the gallery).

The Counters are purely decorative whilst the Cabinets and Drawers serve as decoration and as storage, each having a bit more storage space than a single chest (32-36). Thus, these blocks make for worthy replacements for chests as they not only offer more space but fit into their environment more, given that the environment uses a similar wood type.
